task: Advanced high-value task: Single-Cell Doublet Detection Sample Validation Dataset Contract. Scenario: a review committee needs a row-level exception analysis with no inferred or fabricated inputs for single-cell doublet detection sample. Embedded packet: Records: R1 expected_doublet_pct=32 detected_doublet_pct=55 median_genes=1; R2 expected_doublet_pct=41 detected_doublet_pct=51 median_genes=4; R3 expected_doublet_pct=27 detected_doublet_pct=66 median_genes=0. Remediation options: O1 changes expected_doublet_pct by -12% cost=72500; O2 changes detected_doublet_pct by -18% cost=91700; O3 changes median_genes by -25% cost=52300; max_budget=116400. Rules and constraints: detected>1.8x expected suggests overcall; detected<0.6x expected suggests undercall; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: create a validation checklist and fill it using the supplied records, citing the exact values behind each pass or failure. Deliver single_cell_doublet_2.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
